---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a public-safe improvement aligned with the public core boundary
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful public-safe change.

## Why It Belongs Here

Explain whether this belongs in:
- public core
- optional adapter
- private overlay

## Acceptance Signal

How would we know this is done without requiring private infrastructure?

## Non-Goals

List what this request should not try to pull into the public repo.
